blocks.text: STATE OF NEW YORK DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLESMV-104: REPORT OF MOTOR VEHICLE CRASH
Use only for crashes that happen in New York State. Print or type. Use black ink.
Date of Crash: 2026-06-12   Time: 5:45 PMCounty: -   Locality: Springfield
Check box if crash exceeds $1,000 threshold for property damage: [X]Crash Diagram Code: 2

PART A -- DRIVER / REGISTRANT (Unit 1)Driver Name (as on license): Priya NairDriver License Number: D1234567   State of License: NYRegistrant Name: Priya NairState of Reg.: NY   Vehicle Year/Make: 2022 Honda

PART B -- DRIVER / REGISTRANT (Unit 2)Driver Name (as on license): Marcus WebbDriver License Number: D9981203   State of License: NYRegistrant Name: Marcus WebbState of Reg.: NY   Vehicle Year/Make: 2019 Ford
Briefly describe how the crash happened:Unit 1 was stopped at a red light when struck from behind by Unit 2.
Injuries: [ ] K-Fatal [ ] A-Severe [X] B-Minor lacerations/abrasions [ ] N-Not Injured
THIS FORM MUST BE SIGNED BY THE DRIVER OR REPRESENTATIVE.
Send original to: CRASH RECORDS CENTER, 6 EMPIRE STATE PLAZA, ALBANY, NY 12220-0925
09/17/97 10:88 *PBOS 641 1898 LORTLLARD PTLD Boor
To: A. Sparraw
FROM: 7.0, etacnty
(ONLY IF PARTIAL REGION CONTINUE WITH DIVISIONIS! SCOPE)

lob_schema.source_concept: Field concepts inspired by ACORD 2 (Automobile Loss Notice). Our own field names/JSON structure -- not a reproduction of the ACORD form template, layout, or legal text.

carrier_name.reason: The carrier name or NAIC code is not mentioned in any of the provided documents.

policy_effective_dates.reason: The policy effective dates or term are not mentioned in any of the provided documents.

loss_description.value: Unit 1 was stopped at a red light when struck from behind by Unit 2.

vehicle_vin.reason: The VIN is not present in any of the provided documents.

vehicle_make_model_year.reason: The vehicle is identified as a 2022 Honda Accord across the police report and repair estimate.

damage_location.reason: The repair estimate lists rear bumper replacement and trunk lid repair as the required work.

other_vehicle_plate.reason: The document provides vehicle make and year but does not list the license plate number for the other vehicle.

witness_name.reason: No witness information is mentioned in the provided documents.

police_report_number.reason: The provided documents do not contain a police report number.

reporting_department.reason: The provided documents do not mention a reporting police department.

injuries_reported.reason: The police report explicitly marks 'B-Minor lacerations/abrasions' under the Injuries section.

injury_description.reason: The injury is described as 'Minor lacerations/abrasions' in the police report.

repair_estimate_amount.reason: The total estimate is explicitly stated as $4,250.00 in the repair estimate document.

rental_needed.reason: There is no mention of a rental vehicle or rental car in the provided documents.

additional_remarks.value: Claimant called to confirm mailing address for repair check.
additional_remarks.reason: The adjuster note contains a remark regarding the claimant's call.
